verdict_reasoning: TMED10 (TMP21/p23) is a type I single-pass transmembrane protein of the p24 family. NCBI explicitly notes localization to both the plasma membrane and Golgi cisternae, indicating dual localization — it cycles between the Golgi/ER-Golgi intermediate compartment and the plasma membrane as part of COPI/COPII vesicular trafficking. The dominant compartment is the Golgi/endomembrane system, but a documented PM pool exists. Its outer-leaflet extracellular domain (GOLD domain) is accessible when at the PM. This fits dual_localization: a minority, cycling PM pool alongside a dominant endomembrane residence.
